active.title: Biblioteca de Standards Default de Engenharia
active.summary: Shippar biblioteca curada de standards default (concern-first, warn-only) vendorizada no plugin (assets/standards/) + fetch https no /devflow update (à la napkin, repo standalone devflow-standards); escopo tiered (~16 universais + 4 condicionais, exclui contracts DB-específicos→stacks); standards-loader merge 2 fontes (plugin-defaults + projeto, override por id, disable via standards.local.yaml); modo eject; wiring just-in-time no índice/filtro; ADR-007. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-30-default-engineering-standards-design.md. Plano: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-30-default-engineering-standards.md.
